summary_text: **Findings (Reliability Risks)** - High: Idempotency is not actually verified in the GHA production check. The live assertion is only `count >= 1`, so duplicate inserts/regressions can pass unnoticed ([fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L562](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L562), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L567](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L567)). - Medium: The job is not full linked-runner E2E; it bypasses `run-linked-systems.sh` and calls `xauto-draft-only.sh` directly. This validates adapter internals, but not manifest selection / linked runner orchestration behavior ([fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L531](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L531), [run-linked-systems.sh#L17](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L17)). - Medium: “Verify quoted-author schema” step is non-gating in smoke mode; `verify-error` / `verify-skipped-missing-creds` can still return 0 from the helper script. Failure is caught later, but this step alone does not prove readiness ([fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L524](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L524), [xauto-quoted-author-ensure-schema.sh#L143](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-ensure-schema.sh#L143), [xauto-quoted-author-ensure-schema.sh#L207](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-ensure-schema.sh#L207)). - Low: Workflow-level “live verify” hard-depends on `SUPABASE_URL`; script-level URL derivation from key does not help that final curl check. If URL secret is missing but key is present, this job can fail as environment/config noise rather than product-path failure ([fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L489](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L489), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L562](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L562), [xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L211](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L211)). **Adequacy Confirmed** - For adapter-level production write-path validation, the workflow is mostly self-contained and fail-closed: deterministic seed, no X API/XAI dependency, Notion write disabled, and required write mode enabled (`X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_WRITE_MODE=required`) ([fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L537](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L537), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L541](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L541), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L356](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L356), [xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L620](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L620)). - Required runtime secrets/env for this path are concretely `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `SUPABASE_URL`, and `GH_TOKEN` ([fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L487](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L487), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L488](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L488), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L489](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L489)).
